articles.title: VeChain Foundation Announces Vote To Implement Upgrade, Bullish For VET?
articles.description: Via their Twitter handle, the VeChain Foundation announced the start of the voting process that will allow the community to decide to implement or reject a major update to their network: Proof-of-Authority (PoA) 2.0. This upgrade could usher a new wave of blockchain “mass adoption”, the announcement said. As NewsBTC reported, the PoA 2.0 upgrade will eliminate the tradeoffs of the Nakamoto Consensus and Byzantine Fault Tolerance (BFT) consensus implemented on cryptocurrencies such as Bitcoin. Re

articles.title: Enterprise-grade hybrid blockchain XDC Network unveils new multi-platform SDKs
articles.description: XDC Network, the enterprise-grade hybrid blockchain specializing in global trade and finance, today released a collection of multiplatform software development kits (SDKs), covering iOS, Android, .NET, Java, and Go. The SDKs will allow application developers to easily incorporate XRC-based tokens and smart contracts into their domain-specific applications without expertise in blockchain technology.
